titleEn: ePropelled launches new integrated propulsion unit for agricultural drones
titleZh: ePropelled推出农业无人机专用集成推进动力单元
summaryZh: 美国公司ePropelled发布了一款专为农业无人机设计的集成推进与动力单元，旨在提升喷洒精度。该单元融合高效无刷电机、先进电子调速器和智能电源管理，支持重载喷洒和撒播任务，延长飞行时间并降低运营成本。随着全球农业无人机市场预计2026年突破40亿美元，该技术有望推动精准农业和化学减量应用。
featuredReason: 该技术直接提升农业无人机在精准喷洒、重载作业中的性能，与智慧畜牧中种植业（饲料作物、大田管理）的自动化需求高度契合，为牧场和农场提供更高效的植保方案。
contentFull: ePropelled launches new integrated propulsion unit for agricultural drones 03-06 | Drones | NewsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintePropelled has launched a new integrated propulsion and power unit specifically designed to improve spraying precision by agricultural drones. Photo: Chris McCulloughDemand for agricultural UAVs is growing at a fast pace and advancing their technology is key to capture significant market share. A new unit incorporating propulsion and power technology has been launched onto the market to improve drone performance.A new integrated propulsion and power unit specifically designed to improve spraying precision by agricultural drones has been launched by US company ePropelled. With a manufacturing plant based in New Hampshire, USA, ePropelled also has an innovation centre based in Coventry, UK, and a further engineering facility in Chennai, India. The company is experienced in developing electric propulsion and intelligent power units for uncrewed vehicles on land, air and sea, but its latest innovation is specifically targeting agricultural drones. GrowthWith a global market projected to exceed $4 billion by 2026, the agricultural drone sector is growing at between 20% and 30% per year. That growth is driven by demand for precision agriculture, maximising labour efficiency and adhering to government legislation on reducing chemical use. In order to do this, agricultural drones are becoming more precise in arable farming by enabling more targeted spraying, crop monitoring, and automated field operations. Therefore, tapping more into this market, ePropelled has come up with a new integrated system that combines high-efficiency brushless motors, advanced electronic speed controllers, and intelligent power management into a unified propulsion architecture designed to meet the unique demands of agricultural drone applications.Heavier loads, better precisionKnowing the market, ePropelled says agricultural UAVs require propulsion systems capable of delivering sustained high thrust, precise control, and reliable performance under challenging operating conditions, including exposure to dust, chemicals, and variable temperatures. The company says its system has been engineered to address these challenges by delivering high thrust density to support heavy payload spraying and spreading missions.The new unit delivers improved energy efficiency to extend flight time and reduce operating costs and has advanced thermal management for sustained performance in harsh environments. The integrated motor and ESC control offers more precise and consistent spray application.Overall, the result is a propulsion platform optimised for both light monitoring drones and heavy lift systems operating at scale across large agricultural environments.Reliable performanceDean Marcarelli, Chief Commercial Officer at ePropelled said: “With agricultural drones becoming a core part of farm operations globally, propulsion is no longer just a component decision, it is a mission critical enabler.” “OEMs and operators are under pressure to deliver higher productivity, reduce input costs, and operate more sustainably. By integrating propulsion, control, and intelligent power into a single optimised system, we are enabling a new generation of UAVs that can operate longer, carry more, and perform more reliably in real-world conditions.”Drone shiftePropelled recognises the UAV industry is shifting more towards fully integrated propulsion systems, where motors, control electronics, and power management are engineered together to maximise efficiency, reliability, and ease of integration. While initially developed for agricultural UAV applications, the same propulsion and power architecture can also be applied to a wider class of uncrewed systems, including ground-based robotic platforms used in precision agriculture and autonomous field operations.Dean Marcarelli added: “Over time, this same architecture will also support broader adoption of autonomous systems across both aerial and ground based platforms.”New ePropelled unit benefitsBy delivering a unified motor, ESC, and intelligent power architecture, ePropelled has a number of benefits for OEMs.Improved energy efficiency with extended flight timesReduced operating costs Advanced thermal management for sustained performance in harsh environmentsReduced system complexity and development timeImproved reliability and operational consistencyEnhanced real-time monitoring and diagnosticsSupports more advanced autonomous and data-driven applicationsLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint Chris Mccullough Freelance multi-media journalistMore aboutautonomous technologydrone technologyprecision agricultureadLEARN MORERelated articles02-07 | NewsTersus GNSS AG993: Modular autosteer kit with built-in satellite correction fallbackPremium30-06 | Photo reportDLG Feldtage: hot, dusty and relatively quiet25-06 | NewsAgreenculture acquires Chouette to add agronomic intelligence to autonomous machines25-06 | NewsFieldwork Robotics secures new funding to accelerate raspberry harvesting robot Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
农业无人机需求正快速增长，技术进步是抢占市场份额的关键。一款集成推进与动力技术的新单元已上市，旨在提升无人机性能。

美国公司ePropelled推出了一款专为提高农业无人机喷洒精度而设计的新型集成推进与动力单元。ePropelled在美国新罕布什尔州设有制造工厂，在英国考文垂设有创新中心，并在印度金奈设有另一处工程设施。该公司在开发陆、空、海无人载具的电力推进和智能动力单元方面经验丰富，但其最新创新专门针对农业无人机。

**增长**

全球农业无人机市场预计到2026年将超过40亿美元，该行业正以每年20%至30%的速度增长。这一增长由精准农业需求、最大化劳动效率以及遵守政府关于减少化学品使用的法规所驱动。为此，农业无人机在耕地作业中正变得更加精准，能够实现更靶向的喷洒、作物监测和自动化田间操作。因此，为更深入开拓这一市场，ePropelled推出了一款新型集成系统，将高效无刷电机、先进电子调速器和智能电源管理整合到统一的推进架构中，专为满足农业无人机应用的独特需求而设计。

**更重载荷，更高精度**

了解市场需求的ePropelled表示，农业无人机需要能够在恶劣操作条件下（包括暴露于灰尘、化学品和温度变化）提供持续高推力、精确控制和可靠性能的推进系统。该公司称，其系统经过专门设计，通过提供高推力密度来支持重载喷洒和撒播任务，从而应对这些挑战。

这款新单元提升了能效以延长飞行时间并降低运营成本，并具备先进的热管理能力，可在恶劣环境中保持持续性能。集成的电机和电子调速器控制可实现更精准、更一致的喷洒应用。

总体而言，其成果是一个针对轻型监测无人机和在大规模农业环境中运行的重载系统都进行了优化的推进平台。

**可靠性能**

ePropelled首席商务官Dean Marcarelli表示：“随着农业无人机成为全球农场运营的核心部分，推进系统已不再只是一个组件选择，而是……”
author: Chris McCullough
contentHtml: Demand for agricultural UAVs is growing at a fast pace and advancing their technology is key to capture significant market share. A new unit incorporating propulsion and power technology has been launched onto the market to improve drone performance.
